## Description
Brief description of the change and the problem it solves.

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New resource type support
- [ ] Security improvement
- [ ] Documentation update

## Testing
- [ ] Tested end-to-end in a real AWS account
- [ ] Resource type confirmed tagged within 60–90 seconds of creation
- [ ] No false positives observed
- [ ] CloudWatch logs reviewed for errors

## Checklist
- [ ] CloudFormation template is valid (`cfn-lint` passes)
- [ ] IAM permissions follow least-privilege (only tag actions added)
- [ ] `TEST-RESULTS.md` updated if a new resource type was added
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated
